problem_owner_org.name: HealthServe
problem_owner_org.description: Singapore nonprofit providing medical, counselling, and social support services for low-wage migrant workers.

problem.title: Needs structured intake and follow-up workflows for rising migrant-worker support demand
problem.description: HealthServe expanded beyond clinic care into counselling, casework, and mental health support, then saw a major spike in incoming calls during COVID-19. The public case study says the organization needed a system that could manage every call, log each grievance, and help a small team and volunteer network follow through until support had been provided.

requirements.body: Log every incoming support request in a structured workflow.

citations.source_title: Zoho Desk supports HealthServe to aid migrant workers on time.
citations.evidence_note: Supports employee band, the call-volume spike, the intake and follow-up workflow, and the small-team-plus-volunteer operating model.

requirements.body: Support follow-up by a small core team working alongside volunteers and specialists.

Supports the organization's mission, founding context, and expansion from clinic services into broader medical, counselling, and casework support.

pilot_framework.scope: Pilot the workflow on counselling and case-intake requests, from first contact through assignment, follow-up, and documented support planning.
pilot_framework.suggested_kpis: Track percentage of incoming requests logged, time to first follow-up, percentage of cases with a documented support plan, and open-ticket aging.
pilot_framework.success_criteria: The pilot succeeds if every inbound request is captured, follow-up is more reliable, and staff can see whether a migrant worker has been contacted and supported.
pilot_framework.common_pitfalls: Common pitfalls include incomplete handoff between counselling and case-management teams, inconsistent volunteer documentation, and ticket backlogs during demand spikes.
pilot_framework.duration: A 4- to 6-week pilot is appropriate for one intake and follow-up workflow with a small core team and repeat review cycles.
pilot_framework.resource_commitment: Requires a service lead, a small case or counselling team, and limited volunteer participation to test intake discipline, assignment rules, and follow-up review.
